title: ANN: HNSW build performance (scalar-bound)
description: bench-ann shows HNSW build ~52s for 20k x 768 (single-thread, scalar dot, ef_construction=200). Inherent to pure-Rust/no-SIMD, but levers worth exploring: (1) reusable epoch-based visited buffer (removes per-search_layer O(N) alloc+init, also helps query latency); (2) optional build parallelism mirroring Config::query_threads; (3) revisit ef_construction default. Measure each with just bench-ann. Follow-up to nidus-nhc.

title: ANN: recall integration test harness
description: tests/: in-RAM store of N random unit vectors; assert recall@k vs exact brute-force search (>=0.90 HNSW default ef, looser IVF) for both AnnKind variants. Post-filter test (filtered ANN returns only matching docs). Delete-then-search test. Gate large-N with cfg_attr(miri, ignore); keep one small-N correctness case Miri-clean.

title: ANN: SPEC/docs/README/version updates
description: SPEC.md §9: move ANN (HNSW/IVF) from Still-deferred to shipped; document post-filter approximation + ANN-quant exclusivity. §10 module layout: add src/ann/. docs site + README.md: neutral description (no roadmap promises per CLAUDE.md positioning). Bump Cargo.toml version + sync install snippets in getting-started.md and README. Update CLAUDE.md deferred-seam line.

title: ANN: store wiring (rebuild/extend/reverse-index + search dispatch + post-filter)
description: src/store/mod.rs: ann: Option<Ann> field; rebuild_ann() in open+compact, extend_ann(prev_rows) in upsert. row_to_doc: Vec<Option<(String,String)>> dense reverse index (row -> collection,id) maintained when ANN on. search() dispatch BEFORE with_sorted_scan: when ann is Some, walk graph for top_k*overscan candidates, post-filter by scope+filter+min_score via row_to_doc, f32 rerank survivors -> Hits. None path unchanged.

title: ANN: IVF inverted-list module + unit tests
description: src/ann/ivf.rs: IVF index. Seeded k-means (fixed iters) over a sample to fit centroids, inverted lists row->list, query probes n_probe nearest lists. build + insert_rows (assign to nearest centroid, schedule rebuild past drift threshold) + search. Pure-logic Miri-clean unit tests: k-means convergence on toy data, probe correctness.

title: ANN: HNSW graph module + unit tests
description: src/ann/hnsw.rs: layered HNSW graph over data rows. Adjacency Vec<Vec<Vec<u32>>>, entry point, greedy descent + ef beam search at layer 0, neighbour heuristic pruning to m/2m. Seeded splitmix64/xorshift PRNG (~10 lines, no rand dep) for level assignment. build(full) + insert_rows(incremental) + search(returns candidate rows+scores). Pure-logic, Miri-clean unit tests: connectivity, deterministic level distribution under fixed seed, candidate correctness on tiny in-memory matrices.

title: ANN seam: AnnKind/AnnConfig + Config::ann + open() guard
description: Add the type vocabulary and config seam for ANN. model.rs: AnnKind { Hnsw, Ivf } enum and AnnConfig struct with hnsw()/ivf() builders + setters (m, ef_construction, ef_search, seed, overscan for HNSW; n_lists, n_probe, seed, overscan for IVF). lib.rs: re-export AnnKind, AnnConfig. config.rs: pub ann: Option<AnnConfig> field (default None) + .ann() builder. store open()/in_memory_cfg: reject ann.is_some() && quantization.is_some() with a clear bail!. No behavior change when ann is None.

title: Pure-Rust opt-in ANN index (HNSW + IVF)
description: Add an opt-in approximate-nearest-neighbour search mode (SPEC.md §9 deferred seam). Exact brute-force stays the default; ANN engages only when Config::ann is Some. Two algorithms selected by AnnKind { Hnsw, Ivf }, mirroring the QuantKind seam. Approximate post-filter (walk graph, over-fetch, then apply scope+filter+min_score, f32 rerank). ANN and quantization are mutually exclusive in v1 (rejected at open). Pure-Rust, zero-FFI, no new deps.

title: justfile recipes + docs/README for CLI & server
description: Add serve/build-cli/test-cli recipes; neutral docs page + README section; document cargo binstall nidus and cargo install nidus --features cli.
close_reason: justfile cli recipes + docs guide + README/CLAUDE.md updates

title: Release: cross-target binary matrix + binstall notes
description: Add build-binaries matrix (linux x86_64/aarch64 via cross, macOS aarch64, windows x86_64), package nidus-<target>.tar.gz/.zip, upload to GitHub release, cargo binstall nidus in notes.
close_reason: CI cli jobs added; release binary matrix + binstall notes added

title: Implement nidus serve (axum+tokio HTTP API)
description: Long-lived server wrapping Arc<Mutex<Nidus>> + spawn_blocking. Endpoints map 1:1 to public API (health, collections CRUD, meta, upsert, delete, records, search, flush, compact). Honor --read-only via OpenMode::ReadOnly. Wire DTOs defined in the feature layer (Hit/SearchOpts/Footprint mirrors).

title: CI: build/test the cli feature; keep core + Miri pure
description: Add --features cli clippy/test/build steps without disturbing the pure -p nidus jobs or the Miri job.
close_reason: CI cli jobs added; release binary matrix + binstall notes added

title: Implement CLI subcommands over a store directory
description: clap-based subcommands: collections/create/drop, upsert (JSON in), search (JSON query+opts), get, delete, compact, stats — operating on --dir/--dim, JSON out. Feature-gated module tree.

title: Add cli feature + binary scaffold to Cargo.toml
description: Add non-default 'cli' feature with optional deps (clap, tokio, axum, tower, serde_json), a [[bin]] name=nidus required-features=[cli], src/bin/nidus.rs, and [package.metadata.binstall]. Keep default features empty so cargo add nidus stays pure and just deps unchanged.

title: CLI + HTTP server mode for nidus
description: Add a non-default cli feature exposing a nidus binary: CLI over a store dir plus nidus serve (axum+tokio HTTP). Library stays pure (cargo add nidus = zero extra deps); cargo binstall nidus fetches prebuilt binaries. Includes binstall metadata, CI build/test of the feature, and a cross-target release binary matrix.
close_reason: CLI + server mode implemented, tested, documented; CI + release + binstall wired

title: ANN: exact-prefilter for selective filters
description: The v1 post-filter is silently lossy when a filter/scope is selective (graph walk starves before enough matching candidates surface). Add an exact-prefilter path (or adaptive ef widening) so filtered ANN queries keep recall. Follow-up to nidus-nhc.

title: ANN: CLI/server flags to configure ann
description: Expose Config::ann through the cli feature: nidus serve / cli open flags for ann kind + params; mirror in server/dto.rs if surfaced over HTTP. Follow-up to nidus-nhc.

title: ANN: combine with quantization (quantized walk + f32 rerank)
description: Lift the v1 mutual-exclusion: build the ANN graph/lists using quantized (int8/binary) distances for the cheap walk, then f32 rerank candidates. More recall tuning required. Follow-up to nidus-nhc.
